title: AI Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a realistic police booking portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a realistic staged police booking portrait. Preserve the subject's recognizable identity, facial structure, expression, age impression, eye direction, and front-facing pose where possible. Place the subject against a height-measurement wall in an authentic police-station setting, with neutral serious expression, controlled documentary lighting, realistic skin texture, and sharp true-crime editorial detail. If a placard appears, keep it generic and unreadable.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, changed identity, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, readable text, text overlays, smiling excessively, glamour photography, fashion shoot, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts, cropped head, overexposed, underexposed
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. vintage booking photo, documentary lighting...
